name: launch_app
description: Launch a desktop application by name. Use the friendly name users say, not the full path.

name: open_file
description: Open a file or folder in its default application or file manager.

name: search_files
description: Find files by name pattern under a directory. Returns a list of paths.

directory.description: Where to search. Defaults to home if omitted.

name: set_display_brightness
description: Adjust monitor brightness (laptop screens or DDC-CI compatible monitors).

name: clipboard_get
description: Read current clipboard contents as text.

name: screenshot
description: Take a screenshot. Saves to a path or copies to clipboard.

name: run_shell
description: Execute a shell command. DANGEROUS — must be user-confirmed in the app layer.

command.description: Single shell command, no pipes to dangerous tools

name: convert_image
description: Convert an image file to another format and/or resize/compress it.

max_kb.description: Target max size in KB. Optional.

name: create_note
description: Create a quick text note in the default notes app.

name: set_timer
description: Start a countdown timer that notifies when done.

name: switch_display_mode
description: Toggle dark/light mode, night light, or focus assist.

name: git_action
description: Run a common git action in a repo. Use for devs only.

repo.description: Repo path. Defaults to current directory.
